programme.title: Sweet Micky for President
programme.desc: Music and politics collide when music star, Pras Michel of the Fugees, returns to his homeland of Haiti.

programme.title: The Reverend
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Reverend Vince Anderson's spiritual and musical journey.

programme.title: A Man Imagined
programme.desc: An intimate and hallucinatory portrait of a man with schizophrenia surviving amidst urban detritus and decay.

programme.title: Hummingbirds
programme.desc: Silvia and Beba tell their own coming-of-age story in their hometown on the Texas-Mexico border.

programme.title: The Spiritual Advisor
programme.desc: Spiritual advisor Jeff Hood travels to Oklahoma to fight for the stay of an incarcerated man’s execution.

programme.title: California Dreams
programme.desc: Through auditions across Southern California, the film portrays real people with big Hollywood aspirations.

programme.title: Down in Shadowland
programme.desc: A five year project involving filming on NYC subway.

programme.title: Charm Circle
programme.desc: A powerful portrait of an eccentric family navigating the chaos that both ties and divides them.

programme.title: Sex and Broadcasting
programme.desc: A human, and humorous, look at New Jersey’s WFMU, a radio station that refuses any programming boundaries.

programme.title: Charm Circle
programme.desc: A powerful portrait of an eccentric family navigating the chaos that both ties and divides them.

programme.title: The Spiritual Advisor
programme.desc: Spiritual advisor Jeff Hood travels to Oklahoma to fight for the stay of an incarcerated man’s execution.

programme.title: Rio Breaks
programme.desc: Best friends Fabio and Naama navigate their way through life in a slum and surfing on their favorite beach.

programme.title: Dwarves Kingdom
programme.desc: At a theme park staffed by people with dwarfism, interviews show empowerment for some and harm for others.

programme.title: Arctic Alchemy
programme.desc: Renowned adventurer and climate scientist, Roman Dial embarks on a research expedition in the Alaska Arctic.

programme.title: The North Face Presents: Trango
programme.desc: Skiers Christina Lusti and Jim Morrison, embark on the first-ever ski descent of the Great Trango Tower.

programme.title: Heroes and Martyrs
programme.desc: A terrorist attack on a church in Damascus’ historical Christian community renews old fears.

programme.title: The Reality Of Hope
programme.desc: Virtual reality creator Hiyu has kidney failure. His online friend travels from New York to Stockholm to be a donor.

programme.title: OH YEAH
programme.desc: The story of the iconic music duo Yello and the phenomenon of their 1980s hit song.

programme.title: Mississippi River Styx
programme.desc: An enigmatic drifter with terminal cancer lives his dream of floating the Mississippi Rive on a houseboat.

programme.title: The Spiritual Advisor
programme.desc: Spiritual advisor Jeff Hood travels to Oklahoma to fight for the stay of an incarcerated man’s execution.

programme.title: ifine
programme.desc: The beauty of Blackness through the eyes of youth coming of age amid a skin bleaching epidemic.

programme.title: Brotherhood of Skiing
programme.desc: The first Black Ski Summit took place in 1973 and was attended by over 350 skiers.

programme.title: Lost Arcade
programme.desc: The history of NYC's Chinatown Fair and the legendary arcade that housed dozens of gamers and onlookers.
